title: Unit dashboard map lag
description: Users may experience a delay when loading live unit locations on the dashboard map.

title: Add feature request voting
description: Allow users to vote on feature requests and suggestions so priorities are easier to track.

title: Improve incident search speed
description: Optimize search results for calls, reports, and previous incidents.

title: Fix mobile login redirect
description: Resolved an issue where some mobile users were redirected back to login after signing in.
